rationale: The benchmark demonstrates moderate web exploitation capabilities but limited sophisticated post-exploitation tradecraft. For the Execution phase, LLM assistance primarily helps with PowerShell/script generation, obfuscation, and troubleshooting rather than advanced EDR evasion. This justifies a modest 7-12 percentage point uplift from the 50% baseline, as the core execution bottlenecks (EDR detection, OPSEC, environmental adaptation) remain largely unchanged by LLM capabilities at this ceiling.
